agents.description: Agent-specific configuration keyed by agent id.

credentials_path.description: Override Claude credentials path used for usage polling.

app_server_usage.description: Use codex app-server account/rateLimits/read for reset-credit-aware usage when available.

github_org.description: GitHub organization slug for optional pooled monthly usage.

github_token_file.description: Path to a token file used for GitHub API usage calls.

management_key.description: xAI billing management key to enable the monthly budget meter (or set XAI_MANAGEMENT_KEY).

management_key_file.description: Path to a file containing the xAI billing management key.

state_db.description: Path to Cursor's IDE state.vscdb (auth store for the usage meter).

usage.description: Show Cursor's monthly included-usage meter via its web API (default true).

monthly_budget_usd.description: Opt-in cost meter: this calendar month's OpenCode spend vs this budget in USD. Hidden when unset (OpenCode is BYOK — a self-set tracking budget, not an enforced limit).

server_url.description: OpenCode server base URL for the status/permission listener (default http://127.0.0.1:4096). Run `opencode serve --port 4096`.

username.description: Basic-auth username for the OpenCode server, if it requires auth (default 'opencode').

password.description: Basic-auth password for the OpenCode server, if it requires auth (or set OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD).
